reasoning: The FIDE rating published on the Wikipedia page "FIDE rankings" updates monthly. The value on Jan 18 is the Jan 2026 rating list, which has Carlsen at 2840. Getting at least 1% higher means reaching 2868.4. On Jan 25, the January list will still be active, meaning the rating will be identical (2840). For Feb 17, the Feb 2026 list will be active. To reach 2869 under the FIDE rating system, Carlsen would need to gain ~29 points in a single month. This requires scoring approximately 2.9 points above expected in a supertournament. However, Carlsen is not playing in the main January classical event (Tata Steel Masters 2026) and generally avoids classical world championship cycles, so he will not play enough games to mathematically gain the required rating. Thus, the probability is extremely close to zero for both dates. Setting to floor (0.02) and slightly higher (0.03) for the later date to account for any bizarre Wikipedia vandalism.
